title: Renewable Rocks
description: A simple datapack or mod to make the rest of the rocks and stones in the game renewable!
body:
A simple datapack or mod to make the rest of the rocks and stones in the game renewable using the blast furnace and other renewable stones.

![Blackstone Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41cd02d834bafda5b811586ff6039b84f2ff30dc.png)

![Tuff Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03b4c6bd17c112f0bd9ca6a84c1ce4474fb2cd7c.png)

![Deepslate Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61bd3ed9b063fc346d0c9942305c978e7ff56dca.png)
